ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, Debit Card) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who handled the transaction */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "transaction_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction item */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction ID */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item ID */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item purchased */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of the transaction */,
  "item_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "item_tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the item */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., Dairy, Bakery) */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "shelf_life" TEXT /* Shelf life of the item */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "store_city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "store_state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "store_zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the store */,
  "store_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "store_email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "customer_state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "customer_zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the customer */,
  "customer_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "customer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "employee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "employee_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "employee_address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "employee_city" TEXT /* City where the employee is located */,
  "employee_state" TEXT /* State where the employee is located */,
  "employee_zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the employee */,
  "employee_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "employee_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "employee_position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "employee_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the employee works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "supplier_state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "supplier_zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
